args.reason: Possible safeguarding disclosure in voicemail_transcript from Maria Gomez voicemail. Clinical lead must review within the hour; do not respond to the family with anything beyond a neutral acknowledgement.

args.notes: Review the inbox item for harm/abuse/neglect signals. Do not respond to family with anything beyond a neutral acknowledgement. Follow Cedar Kids safeguarding policy.
args.title: Same-hour review: possible safeguarding disclosure (item_2)

args.body: Hello, thank you for reaching out about Leo Gomez. We've shared your message with our clinical lead, who will follow up with you shortly. If you need immediate help, please call 911.

items.recommended_next_action: Clinical lead must review within the hour. Front desk should not respond beyond the neutral acknowledgement draft.

items.decision_rationale: Caller disclosed dad 'getting rough' with child, indicating possible unsafe caregiving. Per policy, any harm disclosure is P0 safeguarding regardless of scheduling intent; neutral ack only.

args.notes: Verified insurance status came back as out_of_network for Kaiser HMO. Per policy, do NOT hold a slot until a benefits conversation has happened with the family. Call them to discuss options.
args.title: Benefits conversation for Owen Brooks (out-of-network payer)

args.body: Thank you for sending Owen's referral for an OT evaluation. Because Kaiser is out-of-network for our practice, our billing team will reach out to discuss benefits before we hold a slot. Once that conversation is complete, intake will follow up to find a morning time that works for your family.

items.recommended_next_action: Billing should call the family for a benefits conversation before any slot is offered.

items.decision_rationale: Complete OT referral with parent contact and concern; Kaiser is OON per policy, requires benefits conversation before scheduling. Routine P2. Insurance verification returned out_of_network; OON gating applied — no slot held.

args.notes: Parent asked a clinical question. Do not provide an opinion in writing. Offer a screening call or evaluation slot per service-lines policy.
args.title: Clinical question from Jordan Kim via parent portal — route to screening

args.body: Thank you for reaching out about Ava. We're not able to offer clinical opinions over message, but our team would be glad to set up a brief speech screening or evaluation with one of our SLPs to take a closer look and answer your questions. A team member can follow up to discuss next steps whenever you're ready.

items.recommended_next_action: Intake should call or message the family to offer a screening/evaluation. Do not provide clinical advice in writing.

args.notes: Call family to confirm reschedule preference. Check provider availability and offer next openings; do NOT auto-schedule.
args.title: Same-day reschedule for Noah Patel

args.body: Thank you for letting us know about Noah, and we're sorry he isn't feeling well. Our front desk will reach out shortly by phone or email to help reschedule today's 3pm OT appointment. Please let us know if there's anything else we should be aware of in the meantime.

items.recommended_next_action: Front desk should call the family to confirm a new time within today. No appointment is held until staff confirms.

items.decision_rationale: Same-day cancel/reschedule for existing OT appointment due to illness; operational P1 per policy. No safeguarding or clinical content.
